mapper.insert: insert into goods (name, category_id, seller_id, price, original_price, image, description, goods_status, `condition`, delivery_type, send_address_id, reject_reason, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{image}, #{description}, #{goodsStatus}, #{condition}, #{deliveryType}, #{sendAddressId}, #{rejectReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select: select g.id, g.name, g.category_id as categoryId, g.seller_id as sellerId, g.send_address_id as sendAddressId, g.price, g.original_price as originalPrice, g.image, g.description, g.goods_status as goodsStatus, g.`condition` as `condition`, g.delivery_type as deliveryType, g.reject_reason as rejectReason, g.update_time as updateTime, c.name as categoryName, ifnull(u.real_name, u.name) as sellerName, u.phone as sellerPhone, concat(ifnull(a.province_name, ''), ifnull(a.city_name, ''), ifnull(a.district_name, ''), ifnull(a.detail, '')) as sendAddress from goods g left join category c on g.category_id = c.id left join user u on g.seller_id = u.id left join address_book a on g.send_address_id = a.id where g.id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from goods where id in
#{id}
